LanguageData.UB_SNS_Catfarmer.title: Cat farmer
LanguageData.UB_SNS_Catfarmer.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was born on a medieval world on a farm raising cats and felines of all types. From Housecats to exotic Tigers and lions, [PAWN_nameDef] quickly learned how to control and sedate them when push came to shove.
